title: Nedunchalai
desc: Murugan steals groceries from passing trucks in order to make a living. However, things take a turn when he comes across Masani, a corrupt and perverted inspector.

title: Thandatti
desc: Subramani, almost retired, goes on a hunt to find her missing grandmother. However, the search creates more trouble for Subramani than she expected.

title: Lucky Baskhar
desc: Desperate to bring his family out of monetary woes, Bhaskar Kumar, a bank employee, enters the dangerous and murky world of financial scams.

title: Pulimurugan
desc: A small village seeks help from a man with extraordinary force to protect them against man-eating tigers and the drug mafia.

title: Eleven
desc: A seasoned police officer begins an investigation after a series of gruesome murders targeting twins comes to light. However, he soon encounters a sinister game of psychological manipulation.

title: Avan Ivan
desc: A benevolent landlord embraces two half-brothers as his chosen family, nurturing their dreams, but their lives take a perilous turn when they cross paths with a notorious cattle smuggler.

title: Kodiyil Oruvan
desc: An ordinary IAS aspirant, who helps out many misguided youths in his locality and shares a close bond with his mother, takes on a huge challenge when he opposes a powerful miscreant.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Lucifer
desc: The demise of the leader of a political party leads to a massive power struggle. Amidst the chaos, a mystical man named Stephen comes in to ascend the throne.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Aruvi
desc: Aruvi is a gentle girl, born in an unpleasant environment. She grows up with her own unique perspective, but life doesn't get any easier for her.

title: Mookuthi Amman
desc: The life of struggling news anchor, Engels Ramaswamy, and his family changes when a goddess appears before them. Later, with the help of the goddess, Engels sets out to expose fake godmen.

title: Yamakaathaghi
desc: After the demise of a young woman, her spirit remains inside her funeral home and refuses to leave. Soon, her death leads to a disturbing supernatural investigation.

title: Imaikkaa Nodigal
desc: Anjali Vikramadithyan, a CBI officer, sets out to track down a serial killer who the police claim to have killed years ago. However, the investigation becomes personal when he targets her family.

title: Raatchasi
desc: Lieutenant Colonel Geetha Rani implements different plans to reform an undisciplined government school. However, she faces numerous challenges in her way, including a corrupt MLA.

title: Yashoda
desc: Surrogate mother Yashodha is advised to follow a few guidelines to keep herself and her baby healthy and safe. However, something happens at the surrogate centre that puts both of them at risk.
